title: Slenderward Pack
description: Turns the Warden into Slenderman, complete with high-quality sound effects and ambience.
body:
## This pack changes the following:

- The warden's texture has been updated to look like not-so-slender-man complete with the white mask, red tie, and suit!

- The warden's ranged attack beam is now the Operator symbol variating between white and black.

- A majority of the warden's sounds have been modified, this can range from deep bassy bellows coming from the caves, to the infamous radio static everyone knows from Slender: The Eight Pages layered on top of the warden roaring at you, because you dun goofed.

- Sculk shriekers have been made approximately 98% more terrifying and 12% more bone-chilling! :D

- The warden has been renamed to the "Slenderward" in en_US.json, subtitles have also been adjusted.

### Additional information as well as full credits are on [my PMC listing of this pack.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/slenderward-pack/)
